ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio manager, to link to a user */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_portfolio_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_type_id") REFERENCES portfolio_types ("portfolio_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_types" (
  "portfolio_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio type */,
  "portfolio_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the portfolio type */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return for the portfolio type */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Typical investment horizon for the portfolio type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Year or period for which the performance is recorded */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio for the given period */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance period */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets in the portfolio during the period */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities in the portfolio during the period */,
  "net_assets" REAL /* Net assets (total assets - total liabilities) during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "risk_factor" TEXT /* Risk factor associated with the category */,
  "expected_performance" REAL /* Expected performance for the category */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_returns" (
  "category_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category return entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio for the given category */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period for the category return */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period for the category return */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets in the portfolio for the category during the period */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities in the portfolio for the category during the period */,
  "net_assets" REAL /* Net assets (total assets - total liabilities) in the portfolio for the category during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_returns_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_category_returns_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the portfolio within the category */,
  "rank_percentage" REAL /* Percentage rank of the portfolio within the category */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was calculated */,
  "performance_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the performance period used for ranking */,
  "performance_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the performance period used for ranking */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets in the portfolio at the time of ranking */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities in the portfolio at the time of ranking */,
  "net_assets" REAL /* Net assets (total assets - total liabilities) in the portfolio at the time of ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor, to link to another user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the portfolio */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, category, comparison) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_history" (
  "report_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report history entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., create, modify, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_history_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
